base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of vehicles_batch — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1994 final fantasy vi. Chocobo + Falcon airship + Blackjack + Magitek Armor + Imperial submarine. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
